radius.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for radius.

padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for padding inline.

padding-block.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for padding block.

max-inline-size.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for max inline size (surface size scale; the former ki.space.25xl reference misused the spacing scale).

offset.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for offset.

bg.$description: color used by the tooltip component for background.

fg.$description: color used by the tooltip component for foreground.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for font size.

font-weight.$description: font weight used by the tooltip component for font weight.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the tooltip component for line height.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the tooltip component for tooltip shadow.

show-delay.$description: duration used by the tooltip component for tooltip show delay.

hide-delay.$description: duration used by the tooltip component for tooltip hide delay.
